channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: A Project 2025 author carries out his vision for mass federal layoffs
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Trump administration's demand that federal agencies plan to radically downsize is driven by a key figure in the conservative movement who has long planned this move.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Musk and his 'humble tech support' effort get star turn at Trump's Cabinet meeting
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk took a star turn at the first Cabinet meeting of President Donald Trump's new term, holding forth in a black “Make America Great Again” campaign hat on Wednesday about his role as “humble tech support” for the federal government — and laying out dire stakes if his cost-cu
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Trump administration sets the stage for large-scale federal worker layoffs in a new memo
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. government is facing a generational realignment as President Donald Trump directs federal agencies to develop plans for eliminating employee positions and consolidating programs.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bloody crime scene photos play key role in trial of man accused in Palestinian American boy's death
item.description: JOLIET, Ill. (AP) — Photos of a child's bloody body, a black knife holder and other crime scene evidence took center stage Wednesday at the murder and hate crime trial for an Illinois landlord accused of fatally stabbing a 6-year-old Palestinian American boy in 2023.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: EPA head urges Trump to reconsider scientific finding that underpins climate action, AP sources say
item.description: The head of the Environmental Protection Agency has privately urged the Trump administration to reconsider a scientific finding that's long been the central basis for U.S. action against climate change.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hackers slam Michigan tribe for not negotiating after ransomware attack
item.description: A group called RansomHub has claimed responsibility for the cyberattack and submitted a letter to provide its “side of the events.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Judge weighs continued freedom for Adnan Syed in 'Serial' murder case
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — More than a decade after Adnan Syed’s murder case attracted massive interest through the hit podcast “Serial,” a Baltimore judge is considering a request to reduce his sentence to time served, which would allow him to remain free indefinitely even though his conviction still stands.
item.dc:creator: LEA SKENE and BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Woman who lost firefighter father raises money for families of fallen police officers
item.description: "You kind of feel empty because they're not coming home," Barber-Passaro said. "It's just a really [big] loss and you grieve with no closure is the problem.
item.dc:creator: Madison Pearman, NewsNation

item.title: Mystery illnesses claim over 50 lives in Congo: What we know
item.description: Unidentified illnesses in northwestern Congo have killed more than 50 people over the past five weeks, nearly half of them within hours after they felt sick.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: American Airlines flight discontinues landing to avoid departing plane in Virginia
item.description: The maneuver occurred less than two hours before another plane attempting to land at Chicago’s Midway Airport was forced to climb back into the sky to avoid another aircraft crossing the runway.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Child becomes first measles death reported in Texas outbreak
item.description: An unvaccinated school-aged child who was hospitalized with measles has passed away, marking the first death in the outbreak, according to Lubbock and state health officials.
item.dc:creator: Caitlyn Rooney, Fox 5

item.title: Utah is one step away from becoming 1st state to ban fluoride in water
item.description: The Utah governor's signature is all that stands between a state ban on water fluoridation after House Bill 81 cleared its final hurdle in the legislature on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Drachman, Fox 5

item.title: Brawl erupts at board meeting in Thornton Township
item.description: “I don’t trust the person in charge to take accountability for anything else that's going on,” said Wiedeman.
item.dc:creator: Winnie Dortch, NewsNation

item.title: Judge dismisses racketeering indictment against New Jersey Democratic power broker, co-defendants
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A state judge on Wednesday agreed to toss out racketeering charges against New Jersey Democratic power broker George Norcross and those charged alongside him.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump pitches 'gold card' as replacement for EB5 investor visa
item.description: The Trump administration will be revamping the U.S. investor visa, increasing the funds required to secure the status while dubbing the new option a "gold card.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WGN 9

item.title: Prominent Colorado developer assassinated at luxury Belize home: report
item.description: A real estate developer from Denver, Colorado was fatally shot in Belize and police say it could have been the result of a professional hit by a disgruntled business associate, according to local reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NYC Mayor Eric Adams claims prosecutorial misconduct, asking judge to dismiss criminal case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York City Mayor Eric Adams asked a federal judge to toss out the corruption case against him Wednesday, alleging prosecutorial misconduct, even as the Justice Department seeks dismissal of the charges on the Democrat's behalf.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House GOP pushes 'big' budget resolution to passage, a crucial step toward delivering Trump's agenda
item.description: With a push from President Donald Trump, House Republicans sent a GOP budget blueprint to passage Tuesday, a step toward delivering his “big, beautiful bill” with $4.5 trillion in tax breaks and $2 trillion in spending cuts despite a wall of opposition from Democrats and discomfort among Republicans
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RFK Jr. targets childhood psychiatric drugs; doctors push back
item.description: Childhood psychiatrists insist the drugs, for attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and depression, are nonaddictive and proven safe and say they are more concerned about young Americans unable to access psychiatric medications that could help.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, ABC 4

item.title: Supreme Court to hear arguments on 'reverse discrimination' case
item.description: Marlean Ames filed suit against a state agency claiming she was not given a promotion because she is heterosexual.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, ABC 4

item.title: Trump shares AI video envisioning Gaza development with gold statue of himself
item.description: The video also features children holding gold balloons also made to look like Trump and a renovated beachfront with luxury hotels and money flying in the air.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American Airlines jet pulls out of DC landing to avoid collision
item.description: An American Airlines jet avoided a collision with another plane while preparing to land at Reagan National Airport in Washington, D.C., on Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AG Pam Bondi faces pressure to release Epstein, JFK files
item.description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) similarly requested the release of the Epstein files in a Monday post on X.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Zelensky expected to visit White House amid push for minerals deal
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is expected to visit the White House on Friday as Kyiv and the Trump administration work to finalize an agreement on critical minerals.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: No savings expected from nearly 40% of DOGE-canceled contracts
item.description: Nearly 40% of the federal contracts that the Trump administration claims to have canceled as part of its signature cost-cutting program aren’t expected to save the government any money, the administration's own data shows.
item.dc:creator: By RYAN J. FOLEY Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal workers confront mass confusion as Musk's deadline looms
item.description: Confusion and chaos loom as hundreds of thousands of federal employees begin their workweek facing a deadline from Elon Musk to explain their recent accomplishments or risk losing their jobs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How possible USPS changes could affect your mail
item.description: “We want to have a post office that works well and doesn’t lose massive amounts of money," Trump said. “We’re thinking about doing that. And it’ll be a form of a merger, but it’ll remain the Postal Service, and I think it’ll operate a lot better.
item.dc:creator: Brad Hamilton, WGN 9

item.title: New Uber feature may overcharge you. Here's how to turn it off
item.description: Unless you disable it, a new setting in the app may end up costing you the next time you hail a ride overseas.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL Draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, ABC 4

item.title: Beware of text messages about unpaid tolls, FBI and state authorities warn
item.description: Drivers should be on the lookout for scam text messages warning of an unpaid road toll bill, according to recent warnings from authorities.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, ABC 4

item.title: Pennsylvania Gov. Shapiro meets with family of fallen officer, victims of hospital shooting
item.description: "I am inspired by the amazing doctors, nurses, and staff at UPMC and WellSpan Health who did tremendous work to save lives in the face of tragedy," said Shapiro. "It was my honor to meet with them and to thank them for what they do in service to their neighbors.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, Fox 5
